---
title: Toits de lyon
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779810451/20250531_164627_n0kl3o.jpg
description: Vue des toîts à Lyon
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2025/05/10
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779810451/20250531_164627_n0kl3o.jpg)
